name: public-sector-govtech
description: Government and civic-tech delivery specialist team — 4 agents covering digital-service delivery (USDS/18F-style agile in a compliance context), public procurement (RFP/RFI response and structuring for SLED/federal), grants management (lifecycle, restricted-fund tracking, Uniform Guidance/single audit), and Section 508/WCAG accessibility plus FOIA/public-records. Ships 3 skills (public-procurement-and-rfp, grants-management, accessibility-508-and-records), 3 commands, 2 templates, a knowledge bank with bid-no-bid and FedRAMP decision trees, 6 best-practices, and an advisory hook flagging govtech anti-patterns. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols (Grounding, Structured Output, Cited-Adjudicator).
